sys_update_xml.name: sysevent_email_action_389b6085c3298f1c68b2f54d0501314a
sys_update_xml.payload:
falsefalsetruec97d83137f4432005f58108c3ffa917aast_contracttext/htmlfalse 

 

]]>singlefalsefalsecontract.document.viewedfalsefalsefalsefalseeventfalseevent.parm1falsehey team , 

this following details someone download contract document please review 

Contract: ${number}
Viewed By: ${event.parm1}
Document: ${event.parm2}
Date: ${sys_updated_on}

]]>Contract docs view false100falseb32f02370ba13300eb138e6eb4673aa16816f79cc0a8016401c5a33be04be441,62826bf03710200044e0bfc8bcbe5df1true

sys_update_xml.name: sysevent_email_action_fd18a1d9c3edc35c68b2f54d05013122
sys_update_xml.payload:
falsefalsetruec97d83137f4432005f58108c3ffa917aast_contracttext/htmlfalse 

 

]]>singlefalsefalsecontract.document.downloadedfalsefalsefalsefalseeventfalseevent.parm1falsehey team , 

this following details someone see contract document please review 

Contract: ${number}
Viewed By: ${event.parm1}
Document: ${event.parm2}
Date: ${sys_updated_on}

]]>Contract Docs Downloadfalse100falseb32f02370ba13300eb138e6eb4673aa16816f79cc0a8016401c5a33be04be441,62826bf03710200044e0bfc8bcbe5df1true
